name: cpig-bool-refactor-06-offset
description: CPigOffset(sphere, +5) — grows the sphere's surface outward. Exercises field_offset_impl LIBFIVE arm (implicit_field.cpp:831 — libfive tree - distance constant → Kind::LIBFIVE result, no Phase 1 structural Kind::OFFSET triggered for libfive operands). The procedural arm of OFFSET (which Phase 1 promoted to Kind::OFFSET) is only triggered when the operand is non-libfive — covered indirectly elsewhere. Visual: a single sphere of effective radius 15 (= 10 + 5 offset).

checkpoints.name: offset-grow
checkpoints.description: Sphere (r=10) offset by +5 → effective r=15 sphere. Libfive tree - constant fast path.
